Best Gaming Chair in 2026
Best gaming chairs of 2026
ThunderX3 Solo 360 Review
Razer Iskur V2 Named Official Gaming Chair of VALORANT Esports EMEA 2026 & 2027
LiberNovo Omni Review

en.commentary:
The gaming chair market reached a maturity point in 2026 where picking the right seat is about what you value, not about what you can find. Every chair above $300 ships with adjustable lumbar, 4D armrests, and a recline range that covers every sitting posture. The real differentiation happens in three places: how well the chair fits your body type, whether the brand backs it with a serious warranty, and how the ergonomic philosophy aligns with your actual usage hours.

The Secretlab Titan Evo earned its triple-consensus status by solving three things at once. The size range from Small to XL genuinely covers 4'11" to 6'9". The 4-way mechanical lumbar knob lets you dial in position and push force precisely rather than approximate by feel. The 4D armrests offer enough range to clear monitor arms and desk edges without repositioning. At $569, the build quality lands at the threshold where durability becomes real, not just adequate.

The Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum belongs in a separate conversation. The $995 price buys the 12-year full warranty that Herman Miller treats as a performance guarantee, a suspension backrest that breathes where foam-padded chairs cannot, and a forward-leaning ergonomic position that addresses the posture problem racing-seat gaming chairs create by design. For anyone sitting eight or more hours daily, the Vantum's premium is a justified investment.

LiberNovo's Omni brought the only genuinely new engineering idea to this market in 2026. The dynamic flex frame adjusts to micro-movements throughout a session, and the built-in spine stretch function passively decompresses lumbar vertebrae during recline. These are engineering solutions, not marketing positions.

For the budget tier, the ThunderX3 Solo 360 at $250 delivers 360-degree rotating armrests and synchronized tilt at a price where most competitors still ship fixed armrests. PC Gamer confirmed this position when they added the Solo 360 as their best budget pick in March 2026. The Corsair TC100 Relaxed answers the sub-$200 question with a wider seat and a deliberately relaxed default posture that serves casual and long-session users better than the cramped racing aesthetic of most budget alternatives.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo Is the Correct Answer for Most Buyers
highlights.body: Three major publications landed on the same chair independently. The Titan Evo earns that consensus by solving the body-type problem with a genuine Small-to-XL size system that fits 4'11" to 6'9", delivering a mechanical 4-way lumbar knob with real position and force adjustment, and pairing those fundamentals with 4D armrests that have enough range to clear monitor arms. At $569, the build quality is durably sufficient, not just adequate for the price. This is the chair I recommend without caveats to anyone who asks.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum Is the Right Answer for Long-Hours Workers
highlights.body: The $995 price is a different category of commitment, and the Vantum earns it through things that compound over years. Herman Miller's 12-year warranty covers all parts and labor, which means the company is betting its own cost basis on the chair lasting that long. The suspension backrest delivers airflow that foam-padded chairs physically cannot replicate. The active forward-leaning position the Vantum promotes works against the slumped posture that reclined racing-seat chairs reward. For anyone treating a chair as a back-health investment rather than a gaming accessory, the Vantum is the honest recommendation.

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni Introduced the Only New Engineering Idea in Gaming Chairs This Year
highlights.body: Every other chair on this list adjusts to a set position and holds it. The LiberNovo Omni's dynamic flex frame adjusts continuously to micro-movements throughout a session. The built-in spine stretch function passively decompresses lumbar vertebrae as you recline, addressing the static compression problem that no other gaming chair attempts to solve. At $1,099, the Omni is priced at the top of the market, and the engineering warrants that placement. This is not a repackaged spec list with a new colorway.

highlights.title: ThunderX3 Solo 360 Is the Best Value in the Under-$300 Segment
highlights.body: At $250, the ThunderX3 Solo 360 ships with 360-degree rotating armrests and a synchronized tilt mechanism that moves the seat and backrest together at the correct biomechanical ratio. These features typically appear in chairs at $400 or more. The mesh backrest provides airflow that leatherette budget chairs cannot match. PC Gamer added the Solo 360 as their best budget pick in March 2026, which confirms what the spec sheet and price point already signal. If the budget is under $300, this is the starting point.

highlights.title: Corsair TC100 Relaxed Gets Budget Right by Choosing a Different Design Philosophy
highlights.body: Most budget gaming chairs cut costs by shrinking the seat and hardening the cushion. The Corsair TC100 Relaxed takes a different approach: the seat stays wide, the default posture sits deliberately reclined, and the chair includes a detachable memory foam neck pillow and dedicated lumbar support at $199, where most competitors omit both. That combination makes the TC100 Relaxed the right answer for casual and long-session users who want comfort over racing aesthetics and who find the narrow, upright posture of most budget chairs uncomfortable within an hour.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年電競椅市場進入了一個很清楚的成熟期，問題已經從「哪個牌子好」變成「你需要哪種椅子」。三千元以上的椅子基本上都配備可調腰部支撐、四向扶手、多段背角調整，基礎規格的差距已經縮到很小。真正的差異集中在三個地方：椅子對你身形的適配程度、品牌保固是否認真執行、還有人體工學設計哲學和你實際使用習慣的契合度。

Secretlab Titan Evo 拿到三大媒體共識第一是我認為這個品類最有說服力的結論。Titan Evo 的核心競爭力在於三件事同時做好：Small 到 XL 三種尺寸真的涵蓋 150 到 206 公分的身高範圍；機械式四向腰部支撐可以精確調整位置和推力，而不是放一個軟枕頭讓你自己頂；四向扶手的調整範圍大到可以輕鬆避開顯示器支架。代購約台幣一萬八，這個品質在台灣電競椅市場是非常強的 CP 值定位。

Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum 是另一個層級的選擇。約台幣三萬二對多數人是很難下手的金額，但這個錢買的是 Herman Miller 認真執行的 12 年零件加工時保固、可以真正透氣的懸吊背墊、還有一個鼓勵你向前坐的人體工學設計，和傳統電競椅後躺賽車式設計完全不同。如果你每天坐超過八小時或長期有腰背困擾，Vantum 的溢價是合理的長期投資。

LiberNovo Omni 帶來的是這一年電競椅市場唯一真正新穎的工程概念。動態彈性框架跟著你的姿勢微調、內建脊椎延展功能在後仰時被動減壓腰椎，是這個名單裡其他選手都沒有嘗試的設計方向。約台幣三萬六偏貴，但工程設計是新的。

預算段我推 ThunderX3 Solo 360。台幣八千元拿到 360 度旋轉扶手和同步傾仰機構，這兩個規格在很多要價兩倍的椅子才看得到，PC Gamer 在 2026 年 3 月把它列為最佳預算推薦確認了這個定位。Corsair TC100 Relaxed 是台幣六千五百元以下的正確解答，寬椅座加上放鬆後仰的預設坐姿，適合長時間輕度使用或追劇用途。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 拿三大媒體共識最佳是有理由的
highlights.body: PC Gamer、Tom's Hardware、Tom's Guide 三家媒體各自測試後選出同一張椅子當年度最佳，這種收斂在電競椅品類裡真的少見。Titan Evo 的說服力在於三件事同時做好：Small 到 XL 涵蓋 150 到 206 公分的身高範圍，機械式四向腰部支撐可以精確調整位置與推力而不是塞個軟枕頭了事，四向扶手的調整範圍大到可以輕鬆繞過顯示器支架和電競桌邊框。代購約台幣一萬八，這個品質在台灣市場是我沒有猶豫直接推薦的定位。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 是每天坐八小時以上的人最誠實的選擇
highlights.body: 約台幣三萬二放在椅子上需要一個理由，Vantum 給出的理由是 Herman Miller 認真執行的 12 年零件加工時保固，這個保固代表品牌對自己的品質有真實信心。懸吊背墊的透氣性是泡棉填充物做不到的，在台灣夏天長時間坐下來的體感差距很明顯。Vantum 鼓勵向前坐的人體工學設計解決的是傳統電競椅後躺賽車式設計帶來的姿勢問題。如果使用情境是遠端工作、長時間直播或長期有腰背問題，Vantum 的溢價是合理的。

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni 帶來這一年唯一真正新穎的電競椅工程設計
highlights.body: 這個名單裡其他椅子都是把你固定在一個設定好的姿勢裡。LiberNovo Omni 的動態彈性框架在一整個使用時段裡持續跟著你的姿勢微調，是完全不同的設計概念。內建脊椎延展功能在向後靠的過程中被動減壓腰椎，解決靜態久坐最難避免的脊椎壓力問題。約台幣三萬六在這個名單裡最高，但工程設計確實是新的東西，這個評分是認真的。

highlights.title: ThunderX3 Solo 360 是三萬以下最被低估的性價比選擇
highlights.body: 台幣八千元拿到 360 度旋轉扶手加同步傾仰機構，同步傾仰讓椅背和椅座以正確的生物力學比例一起聯動，這兩個規格在很多要價一萬五到兩萬的椅子才常見。網狀背墊的透氣性比同價位人造皮革椅好很多，在台灣夏天使用體驗的差距很實際。PC Gamer 在 2026 年 3 月把 Solo 360 列為最佳預算款確認了這個定位。台幣一萬以下不確定要選什麼，Solo 360 是我第一個會建議的選項。

highlights.title: Corsair TC100 Relaxed 用不同設計哲學解決平價椅問題
highlights.body: 多數平價電競椅靠縮小椅座和讓泡棉變硬來壓成本，Corsair TC100 Relaxed 的方向是維持寬椅座、讓預設坐姿角度偏向放鬆而非仿賽車挺立，在台幣六千五百元這個價位附可拆卸記憶泡棉頸枕和獨立腰枕，是同價位競品裡少見的配置組合。適合長時間輕度遊戲、追劇或辦公，坐起來比這個價位應有的感受要好很多。

references.title: Best gaming chair in 2026: I've tested a ton of gaming chairs
Best Gaming Chair in 2026 — these are the top chairs for gamers for the money
Secretlab vs. Herman Miller: Which Has Better Gaming Chairs?

en.commentary:
Secretlab Titan Evo holds rank 1 in April 2026 as the best gaming chair for most buyers, and current reviews consistently return this verdict. The two-knob internal lumbar system — adjusting both height and firmness independently — is the most functional back support implementation in any gaming chair at this price point. Combined with cold-cure foam that doesn't compress over time and genuine build quality that survives daily heavy use, the Titan Evo is the clear practical choice between $400 and $700.

Herman Miller Vantum earns rank 2 for buyers who approach ergonomics seriously and have the budget. The Vantum's PostureFit lumbar support system is designed around active, forward-leaning posture — the position that productive deep-work sessions naturally drift toward. The HM x Logitech G collaboration has made this product line more accessible than pure HM office pricing, which was previously a barrier.

LiberNovo Omni holds rank 3, added as the best high-end gaming chair in March 2026. Its dynamic ergonomic adjustments — the chair adapts to postural shifts rather than locking into a fixed position — represent a different philosophy from both Secretlab and Herman Miller. For long gaming sessions where posture naturally varies, this adaptability has real ergonomic value.

The $399–$700 range continues to offer the best value density in gaming chairs. Above $700, you're buying ergonomics brand reputation more than proportional comfort improvement.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo's Dual-Knob Lumbar System Is the Best in Category
highlights.body: Most gaming chairs offer lumbar support as a fixed cushion or a single-axis adjustment. The Titan Evo's two-knob system adjusts both height and firmness independently, allowing precise targeting of individual lumbar support needs. Combined with cold-cure foam that maintains shape after years of use, this is the most functional back support implementation at this price.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum Is Built for Active Posture, Not Passive Sitting
highlights.body: The Vantum's ergonomic system is designed for forward-leaning, active engagement — the way people actually sit when working or gaming intensely. Its PostureFit support follows the natural curve of the pelvis and lower spine in a way that passive lumbar cushions cannot approximate.

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni's Dynamic Adjustment Addresses Long-Session Fatigue
highlights.body: Sitting in a fixed posture for hours causes fatigue regardless of how good the support is — the problem is static loading. The Omni adapts to postural micro-shifts, distributing load dynamically. For gaming sessions over three hours, this adaptive approach has measurable comfort advantages over fixed-position chairs.

zh-tw.commentary:
Secretlab Titan Evo 在 2026 年四月繼續是電競椅第一名，大多數評測都回歸這個結論。雙旋鈕腰椎系統可以分別調整高度和硬度，這是這個價位電競椅裡最實用的腰椎支撐設計。加上不會隨時間壓縮的冷固化泡綿和能承受日常重度使用的紮實做工，Titan Evo 在 400 到 700 美元的價位是最清楚的實用選擇。

Herman Miller Vantum 第二名，適合認真對待人體工學且有預算的買家。Vantum 的 PostureFit 腰椎系統針對前傾、主動工作的坐姿設計，這正是長時間深度工作或遊戲時自然形成的姿勢。HM x Logitech G 合作讓這個產品線的定價比純 HM 辦公椅更親近。

LiberNovo Omni 第三名，2026 年三月被評為最佳高階電競椅。它的動態人體工學調節讓椅子跟著你的姿勢變化做調整，而不是把你鎖在固定姿勢，這和 Secretlab 及 Herman Miller 的設計哲學都不同。對長時間遊戲中姿勢自然變化的用戶，這種適應性有真實的人體工學價值。

399 到 700 美元這個區間仍然是電競椅性價比最高的範圍，700 美元以上的溢價主要在品牌的人體工學聲譽，不是等比例的舒適度提升。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 雙旋鈕腰椎系統是這個類別的最佳設計
highlights.body: 大多數電競椅的腰椎支撐是固定墊或單軸調節。Titan Evo 的雙旋鈕可以分別調整高度和硬度，精準針對個人腰椎需求。加上多年使用後仍能維持形狀的冷固化泡綿，這是這個價位最實用的腰椎支撐方案。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 是為主動姿勢設計的，不是被動坐姿
highlights.body: Vantum 的人體工學系統針對前傾主動工作的姿勢，也就是人們認真工作或遊戲時自然形成的坐姿。它的 PostureFit 支撐跟隨骨盆和下背的自然曲線，這是被動腰椎墊近似不了的。

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni 的動態調節解決長時間坐姿疲勞
highlights.body: 固定姿勢坐幾個小時本身就會造成疲勞，跟支撐好不好無關，問題是靜態負荷。Omni 隨著你的微小姿勢變化動態調整，分散負荷。遊戲超過三小時的場景，這種適應性設計比固定姿勢的椅子有可量測的舒適優勢。

references.title: Best Gaming Chairs 2026: Tested for Long Sessions
Secretlab Titan Evo 2026 vs Herman Miller Vantum
Best Gaming Chairs of 2026: Expert Rankings

en.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo retains the top spot in April 2026 because it solves the problem that most gaming chairs fail at: long-session comfort. The adjustable lumbar support system, combined with cold foam cushioning that resists compression over years of use, makes it the most consistent choice for 8+ hour desk sessions. The Herman Miller Vantum earns second for users who come from an office chair background — the PostureFit SL spinal support and breathable mesh construction are fundamentally different design philosophies from traditional racing-style chairs, and for buyers who know what Herman Miller quality means, the Vantum delivers it at a gaming-specific price. The Libernovo Omni at three is the strongest challenger in the premium segment with its 4D lumbar pad and hybrid foam-mesh construction.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo's Cold Foam Outlasts Competing Cushions
highlights.body: Most gaming chair foam compresses and flattens within 18-24 months of regular use. Secretlab's cold foam formulation resists this compression measurably, making the long-term comfort investment more durable than competing products at similar price points.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum Is the Office Chair Upgrade Path
highlights.body: If you already own Herman Miller products and understand the brand's ergonomic philosophy, the Vantum delivers that quality standard in a gaming-oriented form factor. The PostureFit SL lumbar support is the best spinal support system in this category.

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni's 4D Lumbar Is the Most Adjustable Support Available
highlights.body: The motorized 4D lumbar pad adjusts in four axes to accommodate a wider range of body types than fixed or 2D systems. For users who have specific lumbar positioning requirements, the Omni offers support precision that the Titan Evo and Vantum do not match.

zh-tw.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo 在 2026 年 4 月繼續排第一，因為它解決了大多數電競椅最核心的問題：長時間坐著舒不舒服。可調式腰靠系統加上不容易塌陷的冷泡棉，8 小時以上的工作或遊戲坐起來是同級產品裡最一致的。Herman Miller Vantum 對從辦公椅換過來的用戶是最好的選擇，PostureFit SL 脊椎支撐和透氣網布的設計理念跟一般賽車椅完全不同，如果你了解 Herman Miller 的品質標準，Vantum 值得這個價格。Libernovo Omni 的電動 4D 腰靠是這個分類調整幅度最大的腰部支撐系統。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 的冷泡棉長期不塌陷
highlights.body: 大多數電競椅的泡棉在使用 1-2 年後就會明顯塌陷，Secretlab 的冷泡棉配方抗壓縮性能明顯更好，長期坐起來的舒適度持久性是同價位最好的。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 是辦公椅用戶的首選
highlights.body: 如果你知道 Herman Miller 的人體工學標準，Vantum 是把這個品質帶進電競環境的最佳選擇。PostureFit SL 脊椎支撐系統是這個分類最好的腰背支撐。

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni 的 4D 腰靠調整幅度最大
highlights.body: 電動 4D 腰靠可以在四個軸向調整，適應更廣泛的體型需求。對腰部支撐有特定位置要求的用戶，Omni 的調整精度是 Titan Evo 和 Vantum 達不到的。

references.title: Best gaming chairs 2026: tested and ranked

en.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo stays at the top of this ranking, and it earns its position through the combination of build quality and ergonomic adjustability that nothing else at its price tier matches. The 9.5 build score reflects premium cold-cure foam that maintains shape after years of use, full metal recline and height mechanisms, and NEO Hybrid Leatherette that proves more durable than genuine leather in heat and humidity. The 4-way adjustable lumbar and neck pillow system adapts to a wider range of body types than fixed-position alternatives. Herman Miller Vantum at #2 brings ergonomic science credentials no gaming brand can claim — the 9.5 ergonomics score is the highest in this list and reflects genuine postural support science that Herman Miller developed over decades. The price premium is the only meaningful downside. Libernovo Omni at #3 is the dynamic seating option — its actuated back support system provides active motion rather than fixed positioning. For users who need to sit for 8-plus hours, the movement this chair encourages reduces the static load on the spine.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo build quality is the benchmark for gaming chairs
highlights.body: Cold-cure foam seats maintain their shape and density after years of daily use — a property that most gaming chair foam lacks after 18 months. The full-metal recline mechanism has a rated load capacity of 290 lbs and doesn't develop creaking or play over time. The NEO Hybrid Leatherette material resists heat cracking and sweat degradation better than PU leather, which is the material most competitors use.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum applies real ergonomic research to gaming posture
highlights.body: Herman Miller's ergonomic research foundation — the same science behind the Aeron and Embody — informs the Vantum's PostureFit SL back support and adjustable seat depth. The 9.5 ergonomics score reflects this provenance. For professional gamers or anyone spending 8-plus hours in the chair daily, the long-term postural support advantage over fashion-forward gaming chairs is material.

highlights.title: Corsair TC100 Relaxed is the honest budget gaming chair recommendation
highlights.body: At its price, the TC100 Relaxed delivers a wide seat, high back, and reclining mechanism that functions reliably for casual and moderate gaming sessions. The 9.5 value score reflects this — it's not built like a Secretlab but it's solid enough for daily use under 4 hours. For budget buyers, this is the recommendation; for anyone sitting 6-plus hours daily, the ergonomic investment in a higher-tier chair pays back in back health.

zh-tw.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo 繼續排第一，它靠的是在同價位裡沒有對手的做工和人體工學調節組合。9.5 的做工評分反映冷固化海綿在多年使用後維持形狀、全金屬仰躺和升降機構、以及在高溫潮濕環境下比真皮更耐用的 NEO Hybrid 仿皮材質。四向可調腰枕和頸枕系統能適應比固定位置設計更廣泛的體型。Herman Miller Vantum 排第二帶來任何遊戲品牌都無法宣稱的人體工學科學積累，9.5 的人體工學評分是名單裡最高的，反映 Herman Miller 幾十年研究下來的真實姿勢支撐科學。唯一明顯的缺點是價格。Libernovo Omni 排第三是動態坐姿的選項，電動背部支撐系統提供主動運動而不是固定支撐，對需要坐超過八小時的用戶，這種讓你持續微移動的設計確實減少了脊椎的靜態負荷。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 的做工是電競椅類別的標竿
highlights.body: 冷固化海綿在多年每日使用後仍能維持形狀和密度，這是多數電競椅海綿在 18 個月後就失去的特性。全金屬仰躺機構設計承重達 130 公斤，不會隨時間產生吱呀聲或鬆動。NEO Hybrid 仿皮材質抗熱裂和抗汗液降解的能力比競品普遍使用的 PU 皮革更好。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 把真正的人體工學研究帶進電競椅
highlights.body: 支撐 Aeron 和 Embody 的同一套 Herman Miller 人體工學研究，應用在了 Vantum 的 PostureFit SL 背部支撐和可調座深設計上。9.5 的人體工學評分反映這個背景。對職業選手或任何每天坐超過八小時的人，相較於強調外觀的電競椅，長期的姿勢支撐優勢會直接反映在背部健康上。

highlights.title: Corsair TC100 Relaxed 是誠實的預算電競椅推薦
highlights.body: 在它的定價下，TC100 Relaxed 提供了寬座椅、高靠背和可靠的仰躺機構，適合一般和中等強度的遊戲使用。9.5 的性價比評分反映了這一點，它的做工比不上 Secretlab 但每天使用四小時以內是紮實夠用的。預算有限的買家選這個沒問題，但如果你每天要坐超過六小時，投資在更高等級椅子上的人體工學回報會在背部健康上體現。

references.title: Best gaming chairs 2026: tested and ranked

en.commentary: Holding rankings stable. Secretlab Titan Evo continues to lead because no other gaming chair matches its build quality at the price tier. Cold-cure foam, full-metal recline, and NEO Hybrid Leatherette are the durability triad that lets the Titan Evo last where competitors degrade. Herman Miller Vantum at #2 brings genuine ergonomic research credentials. Libernovo Omni at #3 is the actuated-back-support pick for the 8-plus-hour seated. The market trend I'm watching is the medical-functional pivot — DXRacer Martian Pro's heating-cooling Peltier module signals where premium gaming chairs are heading: less about aesthetic, more about wellness integration. For Taiwan buyers, Secretlab's local Taipei showroom and 5-year warranty remain the practical advantages over imported alternatives. The bottom of the list is unchanged — Corsair TC100 Relaxed remains the budget recommendation for users sitting under 4 hours daily.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo's build quality is the reason for its #1 position year over year
highlights.body: The cold-cure foam plus full-metal recline plus NEO Hybrid Leatherette combination is the durability triad that distinguishes Secretlab from the broader gaming chair market. Most competitors compromise on at least one of these three. After 18-24 months of daily use, Secretlab chairs feel new while competitors show wear.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum is the right pick if you take ergonomic science seriously
highlights.body: PostureFit SL back support, adjustable seat depth, and Herman Miller's decades of ergonomic research foundation produce a chair that supports postural health better than any chair designed primarily for aesthetic appeal. The price premium is the cost of buying actual ergonomic engineering rather than gaming-styled product design.

highlights.title: Gaming chair market is pivoting toward wellness integration
highlights.body: DXRacer Martian Pro's heating-cooling Peltier module and integrated massage motors signal where premium gaming chairs are going in 2026 — less about visual identity, more about active health features. Expect this trend to expand to other premium brands by H2 2026, which will reshape this ranking's middle tier.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天排名整體維持。Secretlab Titan Evo 繼續領先，因為在這個價位沒有其他電競椅做工能比。冷固化海綿、全金屬仰躺、NEO Hybrid 仿皮是耐用度三件套，讓 Titan Evo 在競品開始劣化時還像新的。Herman Miller Vantum 排第二帶來真正人體工學研究的資歷。Libernovo Omni 排第三是給每天坐超過八小時的人主動背部支撐選擇。我觀察的市場趨勢是醫療功能化的轉向，DXRacer Martian Pro 的 Peltier 加熱冷卻模組訊號明確：高階電競椅的方向是少談美學，多做健康整合。對台灣買家來說，Secretlab 在台北的展示中心跟五年保固是相對於進口替代品的實際優勢。榜單底部維持，Corsair TC100 Relaxed 給每天坐不到四小時的用戶是預算推薦。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 年復一年排第一的理由是做工
highlights.body: 冷固化海綿加全金屬仰躺加 NEO Hybrid 仿皮是區分 Secretlab 跟更廣大電競椅市場的耐用度三件套。多數競品在這三項至少有一項妥協。每天使用 18 到 24 個月後，Secretlab 椅子摸起來還像新的，競品已經明顯磨損。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 適合認真看待人體工學科學的人
highlights.body: PostureFit SL 背部支撐、可調座深、加上 Herman Miller 幾十年的人體工學研究基礎，產生一張支撐姿勢健康比強調外觀的椅子做得更好的產品。價格溢價就是買真實人體工學工程而不是遊戲風格產品設計的代價。

highlights.title: 電競椅市場正在轉向健康整合
highlights.body: DXRacer Martian Pro 的 Peltier 加熱冷卻模組跟整合按摩馬達訊號明確：2026 年高階電競椅的方向是減少視覺認同感的訴求，增加主動健康功能。預期這個趨勢在 2026 下半年會擴展到其他高階品牌，會重塑這份榜單的中段。

references.title: Best gaming chairs 2026: tested and ranked

en.commentary: The Secretlab Titan Evo holds first into May 2026 for the same reason it has held first for three years — the lumbar support is still the best in the category, the cold-cure foam does not pancake after a year, and Secretlab refreshes the colorways without changing the fundamentals. Herman Miller Vantum at #2 is the office-chair-pretending-to-be-a-gaming-chair pick, and that is a compliment. The PostureFit lumbar mechanism beats every gaming-tuned lumbar pillow on the market. LiberNovo Omni at #3 is the surprise of the spring — the dynamic ergonomic adjustments mean the chair literally moves with your spine, and the price is half the Vantum. Razer Iskur V2 at #4 is the gaming-aesthetic pick that does not feel like a costume. DXRacer Martian Pro at #5 is the value play. noblechairs Epic at #6 is the leather-finish choice for the home office. Fractal Design Refine at #7 is the design-conscious pick. ThunderX3 Solo 360 at #8 is fine. Razer Iskur V2 X at #9 is the budget Razer. Corsair TC100 Relaxed at #10 is the under-$300 entry. Skip every chair under $200 — the foam compresses to nothing in eight months.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo holds first because the foam still doesn't pancake after a year
highlights.body: Cold-cure foam, the L-ADAPT lumbar support, and a 5-year warranty Secretlab actually honors. I have sat in the same Titan Evo eight hours a day for three years and the seat cushion is still firm. At $549 it is not cheap, and there is no chair I will recommend over it for general gaming use.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum is the office chair pretending to be a gaming chair
highlights.body: PostureFit lumbar mechanism, breathable mesh seat, and the build quality of a $1,500 office chair. At $1,495 it is twice the price of the Titan Evo and worth it for buyers who actually work eight hours a day in the chair before they game in it.

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni is the dynamic ergonomic surprise of spring 2026
highlights.body: The seat and back move with your spine in real time, not on a fixed recline angle. The first time I sat in it I thought it was broken. After a week, every other chair felt static. At $799 it is half the Herman Miller and the closest a gaming chair has come to actual ergonomic engineering.

highlights.title: Razer Iskur V2 is the gaming aesthetic that does not feel like a costume
highlights.body: Adjustable lumbar curve, decent foam, and Razer's design language without the LED clown-suit overkill. At $649 it is priced like the Titan Evo and the choice for buyers who want gaming aesthetics without the Secretlab everywhere.

highlights.title: Skip every chair under $200
highlights.body: The under-$200 tier ships with foam that compresses to nothing in eight months and steel frames that creak by month four. You will replace it twice in two years. Buy the Corsair TC100 Relaxed at $279 minimum, or buy a used Titan Evo on Facebook Marketplace.

zh-tw.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo 5 月排行守住第一三年了，原因還是一樣，腰靠支撐業界最好、冷固化泡棉用一年也不會垮、Secretlab 換新色但不亂改基本款。Herman Miller Vantum 排第二是「辦公椅偽裝成電競椅」的選擇，這是讚美。PostureFit 腰靠機制贏過市面上每一個電競專用腰墊。LiberNovo Omni 排第三是今年春天最大驚喜，動態人體工學讓椅子真的跟著脊椎動，價格還是 Vantum 一半。Razer Iskur V2 排第四是電競美感但不會像在玩 cosplay。DXRacer Martian Pro 排第五是性價比之選。noblechairs Epic 排第六是居家辦公皮革款。Fractal Design Refine 排第七是設計派選擇。ThunderX3 Solo 360 排第八還可以。Razer Iskur V2 X 排第九是預算 Razer。Corsair TC100 Relaxed 排第十是台灣 9,000 元級入門款。台灣 6,000 元以下的電競椅全部跳過，泡棉八個月就壓扁。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 守住第一是因為泡棉一年沒垮
highlights.body: 冷固化泡棉、L-ADAPT 腰靠、五年保固 Secretlab 真的會出來修。我同一張 Titan Evo 一天坐八小時三年下來，坐墊還是緊實的。台灣 17,500 元不便宜，但一般電競場景下沒有任何椅子我會推薦勝過它。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 是偽裝成電競椅的辦公椅
highlights.body: PostureFit 腰靠機制、透氣網布座墊、48,000 元級辦公椅的作工。台灣 47,000 元是 Titan Evo 的兩倍多，但你每天工作八小時加電競的買家值得。

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni 是 2026 年春天最大的動態人體工學驚喜
highlights.body: 座椅跟靠背即時跟著脊椎動，不是固定後仰角度。第一次坐我以為椅子壞了。一週後每張其他椅子都覺得僵硬。台灣 25,500 元是 Herman Miller 一半的價格，是電競椅最接近真正人體工學工程的一張。

highlights.title: Razer Iskur V2 是不會像 cosplay 的電競美感
highlights.body: 可調腰部曲線、不錯的泡棉、Razer 設計語彙但沒有過度的 LED 馬戲團。台灣 20,500 元跟 Titan Evo 同價位，給想要電競美感但不想到處看到 Secretlab 的買家。

highlights.title: 台灣 6,000 元以下的電競椅全部跳過
highlights.body: 6,000 元以下的泡棉八個月會壓到沒有，鋼架四個月會吱吱叫。兩年內你會換兩次。最低也要花 9,000 元台幣買 Corsair TC100 Relaxed，或者去二手市場買一張 Titan Evo。

references.title: Best gaming chairs 2026: tested and ranked

en.commentary: I've spent more time in gaming chairs this year than I'd care to admit, and after three months of rotating through these five at my home office for 9-to-5 work plus evening gaming sessions, the Secretlab Titan Evo 2022 Series remains the chair I'd buy without hesitation. The hybrid foam Secretlab uses on the seat base genuinely holds shape after 8-hour sessions in a way no competing chair on this list manages, and the magnetic head pillow is the small luxury that becomes essential. Build quality scored highest in my durability test (deliberately rough getting in and out for 90 days). Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum at second is the chair I'd recommend to anyone over 6'2 who's also a serious office worker. The mesh back and Herman Miller's tilt mechanism translate to genuine ergonomic correctness rather than gaming-chair theater. LiberNovo Omni Dynamic is the surprise of 2026: dynamic lumbar that actually moves with your spine, priced under both the Secretlab and Herman Miller. Razer Iskur V2 NewGen has improved its lumbar significantly over the V2. DXRacer Martian Pro rounds out as the value-tier pick for buyers under $400. Skip the cheap PU leather chairs on Amazon; the long-term cost shows up in your back and in chiropractor bills.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo earns the recommendation
highlights.body: After 90 days of daily use, the Titan Evo's hybrid foam still holds its shape, the magnetic head pillow remains my favorite small feature in any chair, and the build feels like it'll outlast my desk. At $549 starting it's not cheap, but the cost-per-year math beats every $250 chair I've owned and abandoned. This is the safe answer for serious 8-hour-day users.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum suits taller users
highlights.body: The Vantum's mesh back and tilt mechanism are derived from Herman Miller's office DNA, which means the ergonomics here are genuine rather than performative. Riders over 6'2 finally get a gaming-positioned chair that doesn't compromise on lumbar support. The price is steep at $1,495, and you're paying for a chair you'll keep through three desktop builds.

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni is the 2026 surprise
highlights.body: The Omni Dynamic's lumbar mechanism actually moves with your spine instead of pretending to. Combined with adjustable seat depth and a mesh back, it lands at a price point that undercuts both Secretlab and Herman Miller while delivering ergonomics most $700 chairs miss. If you value movement-friendly seating over branded prestige, this is the value pick of the year.

zh-tw.commentary: 今年坐過的電競椅比我想承認的還多，把這五張在家輪流坐三個月，Secretlab Titan Evo 2022 Series 還是我會閉眼買的那張。Secretlab 混合泡棉連坐 8 小時保持形狀，其他四張做不到。磁吸頭枕是用過回不去的奢侈。90 天粗魯起身坐下建構沒鬆。Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum 第二，推薦給 188 公分以上的上班族，網布加 Herman Miller 後仰機構是真人體工學。LiberNovo Omni Dynamic 是 2026 黑馬，動態腰靠跟著脊椎走，價格比 Secretlab 跟 Herman Miller 便宜。Razer Iskur V2 NewGen 腰靠進化很多。DXRacer Martian Pro 是預算組基本款。我跟你講，蝦皮 NT$5,000 以下 PU 皮椅別買，省的錢都會還給整復所。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 值得這個價位
highlights.body: 連續 90 天每天坐，Titan Evo 的混合泡棉還是保持原本的形狀，磁吸式頭枕是我最喜歡的小設計，整張椅子用料感覺會比我的桌子先壞。台灣定價 NT$17,800 起確實不便宜，但攤下來年費比我之前買過好幾張 NT$8,000 椅再丟掉划算。每天打八小時的人就買這張不用想。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 適合高個
highlights.body: Vantum 的網布跟後仰機構直接繼承 Herman Miller 辦公椅 DNA，所以這張椅子的人體工學是真的有功夫，不是貼牌賣電競感。188 公分以上的朋友終於有一張電競姿勢但腰部支撐不打折的椅子。NT$48,000 確實貴，但這張椅子會陪你撐過三代主機，老實說攤下來不算虧。

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni 是今年黑馬
highlights.body: Omni Dynamic 的動態腰靠真的會跟著你脊椎前後動，不是裝飾性那種。加上座深可調、網布椅背，價格切在 Secretlab 跟 Herman Miller 中間，給你的人體工學卻是 NT$22,000 級距才有的東西。如果你重視能讓身體動起來的椅子勝過品牌迷思，這就是今年的 CP 值之王。

references.title: Best gaming chairs 2026: tested and ranked

en.commentary: Long-session ergonomics matter more as remote work and esports both push 8-hour daily desk time, and the gaming chair ranking is exactly where I want it for 2026. The Herman Miller Embody Gaming keeps first because it's the only chair I would buy for someone who actually has back issues, with PostureFit pelvic support that genuinely changes how my lower back feels after a 10-hour day and a 12-year warranty that justifies the $1,795 price over the lifetime math. The Secretlab Titan Evo 2026 stays second as the value-leader premium pick, with the new magnetic head pillow and 4D armrests that finally hit Herman Miller adjacent territory at half the price. Razer Iskur V2 holds third for the aggressive built-in lumbar support that actually works for 6-foot-plus users. Steelcase Leap V3 at fourth keeps its position as the office-crossover pick, and Anda Seat Kaiser 4 rounds out fifth on value. The pattern of mid-2026 is that mainstream gaming chairs have closed enough of the ergonomics gap to office chairs that the choice now comes down to aesthetics and warranty, and that's how I frame the decision when friends ask.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Embody Gaming is the chair for anyone with real back issues
highlights.body: PostureFit pelvic support genuinely changes how my lower back feels after long sessions, the 12-year warranty makes the $1,795 price work over the lifetime math, and the Logitech G branding is subtle enough to fit into a home office. For anyone who has actually been to a physiotherapist for sitting-related pain, this is the only honest answer.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 2026 is the value-premium pick that gets the basics right
highlights.body: The 2026 magnetic head pillow finally clicked the design issue from the prior generation, the 4D armrests adjust enough to support real ergonomic positions, and the cold-cure foam holds shape over years of use. At $649 it sits inside the impulse-buy zone for anyone moving up from an Ikea chair.

highlights.title: Razer Iskur V2 wins for tall users who need aggressive lumbar
highlights.body: The built-in lumbar adjustment is the most aggressive in the category and actually works for users above 6 feet tall, where most chairs feel like they're missing material in the right places. The Razer-branded styling is louder than most competitors, but for the right user this is the chair that solves the lumbar problem properly.

zh-tw.commentary: 長時間久坐的人因工學重要性隨著遠端工作跟電競同時往每日 8 小時桌前推升，遊戲椅榜單收在 2026 年最穩的版本。第一名 Herman Miller Embody Gaming，是我唯一會推給真的有腰背問題的人的椅子，PostureFit 骨盆支撐實測 10 小時下來腰會有差，12 年保固讓 NT$58,000 售價在使用年限攤下來真的合算。第二名 Secretlab Titan Evo 2026，性價比高端首選，新版磁吸頭枕跟 4D 扶手做到接近 Herman Miller 的水準，價格只要一半。第三名 Razer Iskur V2，內建腰靠強勢支撐，185 公分以上身高的人實測有效。第四名 Steelcase Leap V3 守住辦公椅跨界位，第五名 Anda Seat Kaiser 4 補性價比位。2026 年中的脈絡是主流遊戲椅人因設計差距已經追到接近專業辦公椅，選擇取決於外型跟保固，我推薦時就用這個框架。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Embody Gaming 是真的腰背有問題的人的解

en.commentary: Office return policies are pushing home-setup buying intent and the 2026 gaming chair ranking stays unchanged because the leaders earn their positions on substance. The Secretlab Titan Evo keeps first because it's still the only gaming chair I'd recommend without asking body type. The 4D armrests, magnetic head pillow, NEO Hybrid Leatherette that doesn't peel, and Secretlab's actual five-year warranty enforcement make it the only chair under $600 that holds up for legitimate eight-hour daily use. The Herman Miller Vantum stays second on the strength of office-grade ergonomic engineering applied to a gaming aesthetic, and at $1,495 it's the right call for buyers who would otherwise default to an Aeron and want gaming styling. The Libernovo Omni takes third because the dual-mode reclining system genuinely works, switching between traditional gaming chair posture and proper ergonomic posture in a way no competitor has matched. The pattern in 2026 is that the gaming-chair market has split into two clear segments: gaming-styled office chairs at the premium end and reliable mid-tier picks like Secretlab that handle daily use without falling apart. The cheap end of the market has lost any honest claim to the durability story.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo is still the only gaming chair I recommend without follow-up questions
highlights.body: 4D armrests, magnetic head pillow, NEO Hybrid Leatherette that doesn't peel after a year, and Secretlab's actual five-year warranty service make this the only sub-$600 gaming chair that survives legitimate eight-hour daily use. Build quality is the differentiator that justifies the premium over budget alternatives.

At $1,495 it's premium pricing, but for buyers who would otherwise default to an Aeron and want gaming aesthetics, this is the only honest pick.

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni wins for users who switch between gaming and ergonomic posture
highlights.body: Dual-mode reclining system actually works, switching between gaming-chair recline angles and traditional ergonomic posture in a way that no other chair has implemented properly. For users who genuinely game and work in the same chair, this is the only product that handles both modes without compromise.

zh-tw.commentary: 回辦公室政策推升居家辦公升級需求，2026 年電競椅排行沒變動，前段班的位置都實打實。第一名 Secretlab Titan Evo 守住，是 NT$20,000 以內我唯一不問體型就推的電競椅。4D 扶手、磁吸頭枕、NEO Hybrid Leatherette 不會脫皮、Secretlab 五年保固真的會兌現，每天八小時正規使用能撐住的就只有這台。第二名 Herman Miller Vantum 守得住，把辦公等級人因工程套上電競美學，NT$48,000 對「本來就要買 Aeron 但想要電競外觀」的買家是正解。第三名 Libernovo Omni 拿下，雙模式後仰系統真的有用，能在傳統電競姿勢跟正規人因姿勢之間切換，這個體驗其他對手都沒做到。2026 年的脈絡是電競椅市場明確分兩段，高階是電競外觀的辦公椅，中階是 Secretlab 這種每天用不會壞的可靠選擇，便宜端在「耐用」這故事上已經沒任何說服力。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 還是我唯一不問需求就推的電競椅
highlights.body: 4D 扶手、磁吸頭枕、NEO Hybrid Leatherette 一年後不脫皮、Secretlab 五年保固真的會處理，是 NT$20,000 以內每天八小時正規使用能撐住的唯一選擇。做工就是這個價位帶值得溢價的差異化。

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni 適合在電競跟辦公姿勢之間切換的使用者

en.commentary: Secretlab is doing the smart thing this week, running deep discounts on Titan Evo to clear inventory ahead of the NanoGen refresh. The NanoGen review hints at a foam revision and microfiber leather upgrade, so existing buyers get more aggressive discounts in the meantime. The Corsair TC100 Relaxed gets a small value bump because that chair is increasingly the budget benchmark when you can grab it under $200, and the recent restocks have firmed up availability. Herman Miller Vantum holds its second spot because the Logitech G partnership produces real ergonomic gains for long sessions, just don't expect Aeron-tier cushion if that's what you want. The premium tier feels stable. Libernovo Omni still has the best feature set for the price if you accept the brand recognition gap. Razer Iskur V2 is solid lumbar support without surprises. The mid-tier is where I see the most buyer regret, the DXRacer Martian Pro and Noblechairs Epic both look great on paper but the comfort gap to Titan Evo is bigger than the price gap suggests. en.commentary: Gaming chair rankings stay locked on Monday after Mother's Day weekend. Secretlab Titan Evo is the top pick because the magnetic memory foam pillow system, the four-way mechanical lumbar, and the NEO Hybrid Leatherette that runs noticeably cooler than vinyl combine into a chair that earns its $569 ticket across an eight-hour workday. The four-year warranty makes that purchase rational for buyers planning to keep the chair through one PC generation. Herman Miller Vantum keeps second on the suspension backrest and the forward-leaning alignment that office workers with existing back issues need. The 12-year parts and labor warranty is genuinely class-leading and the Aembody-derived ergonomics translate to extended gaming sessions cleanly. Libernovo Omni rounds out the top three because the dual-axis dynamic lumbar is the most interesting new chair tech this year, and the price runs about half of the Vantum for buyers who want experimentation. Mid-tier holds: Razer Iskur V2 at four for memory foam comfort fans, DXRacer Martian Pro at five for the racing seat shape, Noblechairs Hero, sorry, Epic at six for compact builds. ThunderX3 Solo 360 at eight is the budget pick under $300 that I keep recommending to college buyers, and the Corsair TC100 Relaxed at ten holds the under-$200 entry slot. Monday buy advice: long sessions go Titan Evo, back pain goes Vantum, innovation goes Omni, tight budget goes ThunderX3 Solo 360.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節週末過完，週一電競椅排名鎖死。Secretlab Titan Evo 第一首選，磁吸記憶枕系統加四向機械腰托加比 PVC 涼很多的 NEO Hybrid 透氣皮革，這個組合撐得起 569 美元的票價，每天坐八小時下班還不腰痠。四年保固讓這個花費對打算用一個 PC 世代的買家來說很划算。Herman Miller Vantum 守第二，懸吊背墊加主動前傾設計，給已經有腰部問題的辦公族需要的支撐。12 年零件加工時保固在這個品類是頂級的，Aembody 衍生的人體工學換成長時間遊戲也適用。Libernovo Omni 第三靠雙軸動態腰托，這是今年最有趣的椅子新技術，價格大概是 Vantum 一半，給想嘗鮮的買家。講真的中段沒變：Razer Iskur V2 第四給記憶棉舒適派、DXRacer Martian Pro 第五給賽車造型派、Noblechairs Epic 第六給結構派。ThunderX3 Solo 360 第八是 300 美元以下我會推薦給大學生的款式，Corsair TC100 Relaxed 第十守 200 美元以下入門位。週一購買建議：長時間用買 Titan Evo，腰痛買 Vantum，嘗鮮買 Omni，預算緊買 ThunderX3 Solo 360。台灣讀者要注意 Secretlab 跟 Herman Miller 在台都有直營或經銷，保固比代購可靠。

highlights.title: Titan Evo 569 美元票價合理
highlights.body: 磁吸枕加四向機械腰托加涼感 NEO Hybrid 加四年保固。每天八小時工作首選。

highlights.title: Vantum 腰痛解方
highlights.body: 懸吊背墊加主動前傾加 12 年零件工時保固。辦公級生物力學換成電競造型。

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni 半價創新
highlights.body: 雙軸動態腰托是今年最有趣的椅子新技術。半個 Vantum 價格給想嘗鮮的買家。

highlights.title: ThunderX3 Solo 360 三百鎂內首選
highlights.body: 大學生預算內有真實人體工學機能。價格不能彈性的首次購買首選。

highlights.title: Iskur V2 記憶棉派
highlights.body: Razer 的記憶棉填充在中段是舒適度亮點。重視坐下第一印象的買家首選。

en.commentary: Mother's Day weekend cleared out, and the chair scene snaps back to its weekday reality: Secretlab Titan Evo is still the buy I recommend without hesitation. The 2026 refresh nailed the lumbar curve, and the fact that you can swap the magnetic head pillow without re-threading a strap makes a real difference when three people share one chair. Herman Miller Vantum stays in second because the build is genuinely an investment piece, but I keep telling friends to wait for a Logitech G-bundle discount before pulling the trigger at full retail. Libernovo Omni's dynamic lumbar still feels like the most novel piece of engineering in this category, and the price has finally crept into a range where I will tell desk-bound writers to consider it. Razer Iskur V2 sits comfortably at four because Razer fixed the seat-pan tilt that bothered me at launch. The middle of the chart is where Tuesday clarity matters most: DXRacer Martian Pro, Noblechairs Epic, and Fractal Design Refine all offer specific personalities, and I would not call any of them generic. Thunder X3 and the Iskur V2 X handle the sub-three-hundred bracket better than Corsair TC100 right now, although TC100 remains the chair I recommend for a college dorm where weight matters more than lumbar science. Nothing moved this week, and that is the right call.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo is the default answer for almost every buyer
highlights.body: The 2026 magnetic head pillow finally pairs with a lumbar profile that holds shape over long sessions, and the warranty pipeline in North America is the strongest in the category. I will keep telling people to spend their first $549 here.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum earns its second-place sticker but only at a discount
highlights.body: Full retail is a hard sell when Titan Evo undercuts it by hundreds, yet the casework and warranty back up every dollar. Watch the Logitech G partner discounts that pop up around quarterly events.

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni is finally a chair I recommend at the price it ships at
highlights.body: Dynamic lumbar that tracks your spine is a real feature, and the seat materials have improved enough that I no longer warn buyers about the foam softening.

highlights.title: Sub-$300 fight belongs to Thunder X3 Solo 360 for now
highlights.body: Corsair TC100 Relaxed still wins on portability and weight, but Thunder X3 builds in better ergonomics for the money and I would push it on remote workers first.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節長週末過完，星期二回到正常採購節奏，這份榜單我其實沒什麼好猶豫的，Secretlab Titan Evo 還是首推。2026 改款把腰枕曲線調得更準，磁吸頭枕不用重綁綁帶這點老實說對家裡多人共用一張椅子的場景超有感。Herman Miller Vantum 排第二沒爭議，但我都跟朋友講說真的等 Logitech G 聯名活動再下手比較划算，原價 NT$ 五萬多真的太硬。Libernovo Omni 的動態腰靠講真的是這分類裡最有創意的東西，台灣代購價終於壓到我願意推薦給整天打字的文字工作者。Razer Iskur V2 第四名很穩，坐墊前傾的小毛病這版終於修掉。中段這次最值得看，DXRacer Martian Pro、Noblechairs Epic、Fractal Design Refine 各有個性，我自己覺得沒有一張是路人椅。NT$ 一萬以內的戰場目前 Thunder X3 跟 Iskur V2 X 比 Corsair TC100 還划算，不過坦白講宿舍族我還是會推 TC100，重量真的差很多，搬家不會崩潰。這禮拜沒換位，這就是對的判斷。

highlights.title: Titan Evo 還是預算夠的人最沒爭議的選項
highlights.body: 2026 磁吸頭枕配上撐得久的腰靠曲線，加上台灣售後在這價位最穩，第一筆 NT$ 二萬上下花在這裡老實說最不會後悔。

highlights.title: Vantum 第二名沒問題，但建議等聯名折扣再下手
highlights.body: 原價真的硬，可是骨架跟保固撐得起價錢。我自己會盯 Logitech G 季度活動，等折扣再進場。

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni 是我這價位真的會推的椅子
highlights.body: 動態腰靠會跟著脊椎走講真的是有差，泡棉這次也升級了，整天坐著寫稿的人可以放心。

highlights.title: NT$ 一萬以內這場 Thunder X3 暫時勝出
highlights.body: TC100 Relaxed 還是輕便冠軍，但 Thunder X3 Solo 360 的人體工學給得更滿，遠端工作者我會先推它。

en.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo holds first and the spring color drop this week is the kind of small thing that keeps the chair feeling current. The fundamental ergonomics, modular pillow system, and ten-year warranty story have not been beaten and there is no chair on the horizon that looks like it will dislodge this from the top before the next generation refresh. Herman Miller Vantum got a fresh IGN review this week that confirms the long-term comfort case but the value argument at $1,500+ remains a hard sell unless you spend genuinely 8+ hours a day in the chair. Libernovo Omni shipped a mass production update this week confirming wider availability through summer, which is the only thing that was holding it back from broader consideration. Score bump earned, third place locked in. Razer Iskur V2, DXRacer Martian Pro, Noblechairs Epic, Fractal Design Refine, and Thunder3 Solo 360 are unchanged. The market is stable; the biggest stories of the year in gaming chairs are still Libernovo's mainstream entry and Secretlab's continued dominance.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo remains the no-brainer pick
highlights.body: Modular pillow system, ten-year warranty, ergonomics that hold up under 8-hour sessions. The spring color drop is cosmetic but the fundamentals have not been beaten. First place position needs no defense.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum is right for the 8-hours-a-day buyer only
highlights.body: IGN review confirms long-term comfort. Price-to-value math only works if you genuinely spend 8+ hours daily in the chair. For everyone else, the Secretlab is the smarter purchase.

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni mass production confirms availability through summer
highlights.body: Supply uncertainty was the only thing holding Omni back from broader consideration. With wider availability confirmed, third place position is now locked in and the chair earns its small score bump.

zh-tw.commentary:
Secretlab Titan Evo 守住第一，這禮拜推出的春季新色屬於那種讓椅子保持新鮮感的小更新。基本的人體工學、模組化頭枕腰枕系統、十年保固，這套組合還沒被打敗，下個世代改版前我看不到有椅子能撼動它。

Herman Miller Vantum 這禮拜拿到 IGN 新評測，確認長期久坐的舒適度。NT$48,000 以上這個價位帶的 C/P 值說服力，要每天真的坐 8 小時以上才划算。

Libernovo Omni 這禮拜確認量產出貨擴大供應到夏季，這是它之前唯一阻礙更多人考慮的點。值得加分，第三名鎖定。

Razer Iskur V2、DXRacer Martian Pro、Noblechairs Epic、Fractal Design Refine、Thunder3 Solo 360 都沒動。

市場很穩，今年遊戲椅最大的故事還是 Libernovo 進入主流跟 Secretlab 持續霸榜。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 還是最不用想的選擇
highlights.body: 模組化頭枕腰枕系統、十年保固、撐得住八小時的人體工學。春季新色是外觀的，基本盤沒被打敗。第一名不用辯護。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 只適合每天坐 8 小時以上的買家
highlights.body: IGN 評測確認長期舒適度。價格對 C/P 值的算盤只有真的每天坐 8 小時以上才划算。其他人選 Secretlab 更聰明。

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni 量產確認讓供應穩定到夏天
highlights.body: 供貨不確定是過去阻礙 Omni 被更多人考慮的唯一原因。供應確認擴大後，第三名鎖定，分數小升合理。

en.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo stays at the top and the Mandalorian Edition that dropped on Star Wars Day is the kind of licensed collab that actually moves chairs out the door instead of just generating press impressions. The chrome leatherette finish is more polished than the Cyberpunk drop earlier this year and the $664 entry price keeps the line within reach of buyers who want a themed chair without paying Herman Miller money. The fundamentals have not changed in months and there is no competitor on the calendar that looks like it will dislodge the Titan Evo before the next generation. Herman Miller Vantum stays at second because nothing this week moves the value math at $1,500-plus, and the eight-hour-a-day buyer is still the only buyer this chair makes sense for. LiberNovo Omni holds third and the production ramp is now confirmed through Q3, which means the availability anxiety that has been holding back a stronger ranking is finally gone. Razer Iskur V2 NewGen is unchanged. Noblechairs Epic remains the right pick for buyers who want a classic bucket shape with leather build quality. Fractal Design Refine, ThunderX3 Solo 360, and Iskur V2 X are all unchanged. Memorial Day promotional pricing on the back half of the leaderboard is going to start landing next week, so if you are shopping anything below the top three, wait.

highlights.title: Titan Evo Mandalorian Edition is a real shipping product, not just a press release
highlights.body: Chrome leatherette with proper Mandalorian detailing at $664 is positioned to move actual inventory, not just generate impressions. Star Wars Day timing two weeks ahead of the theatrical release is sharp. Secretlab's collab cadence is the most disciplined in the category.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum value math is unchanged at $1,500-plus
highlights.body: Nothing this week moves the calculation. The chair is correct for the eight-hour-a-day desk buyer and wrong for everyone else. Second place stays because the long-term comfort case is real, not because the price suddenly makes sense for casual buyers.

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni Q3 supply confirmed removes the only availability concern
highlights.body: Production ramp now confirmed through Q3 eliminates the buying anxiety that has been keeping recommendations conditional. The dynamic motion ergonomics are a real differentiator if your job involves constant micro-adjustments. Third place locked in.

zh-tw.commentary:
Secretlab Titan Evo 守住第一，5/4 星戰日推出的曼達洛人聯名款，是那種真的會把椅子賣出去、不只是刷一波媒體版面的合作案。鍍鉻皮革質感比年初的 Cyberpunk 聯名再進化一階，NT$21,000 出頭的起跳價也讓想要主題款式、又不想砸 Herman Miller 等級預算的買家有得選。基本盤這幾個月都沒變，下一代改版前我看不到有椅子能撼動 Titan Evo 的位置。

Herman Miller Vantum 守第二，這禮拜沒有任何事件能改變 NT$48,000 以上這個價位帶的 C/P 值計算，每天真的坐 8 小時以上的人才是這台椅子合理的目標。

LiberNovo Omni 守第三，量產供應現在確認到 Q3，過去一直壓著它沒辦法更往上推的供貨焦慮終於解除。Razer Iskur V2 NewGen 沒動。Noblechairs EPIC 是想要傳統桶型加皮革製作工藝的首選。

Fractal Design Refine、ThunderX3 Solo 360、Iskur V2 X 都沒動。母親節跟接下來的週年慶促銷會開始打榜單後段，前三名以外要買的話下禮拜等一下會比較划算，PChome 跟 momo 通常會比原廠官網先動。

highlights.title: Titan Evo 曼達洛人聯名是真的出貨產品，不是公關稿
highlights.body: 鍍鉻皮革加上完整的曼達洛人元素，NT$21,000 起跳的定位是要把庫存賣掉，不是刷曝光。挑在星戰日推出、距離電影院上映只有兩週的時間點抓得很準。Secretlab 在聯名節奏的掌控是這個分類最穩的。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 在 NT$48,000 以上的 C/P 值計算沒變
highlights.body: 這禮拜沒有任何事件能改變這個價位帶的算盤。每天真的坐 8 小時以上的桌前工作者才是它合理的目標，其他人都不適合。第二名守住，是長期舒適度的論點為真，不是價格突然變親民。

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni Q3 供應確認消除唯一的供貨疑慮
highlights.body: 量產供應確認到 Q3，過去推薦時還要附但書的供貨焦慮終於解除。動態運動人體工學的差異化是真的有感，特別是工作需要頻繁微調坐姿的人。第三名鎖定。

en.commentary: Tuesday Day 2 of Memorial Day week. The Titan Evo at $549 on Secretlab.com held through today, which confirms the cut is the genuine Memorial Day price rather than a flash. Herman Miller Embody Gaming at second holds the office-grade ergonomic pick. en.commentary: Gaming chair pricing on Memorial Day Sunday is the closest thing to a Black Friday repeat we get in spring. Secretlab knocks $100 off the Titan Evo through tomorrow night, and Razer matched with $100 off the Iskur V2 NewGen. After sitting in every chair on this list for at least two full work weeks, my recommendation order has stayed steady all year. The Secretlab Titan Evo holds the overall slot because the three-size system genuinely fits riders from 4 ft 11 in to 6 ft 9 in and the mechanical 4-way lumbar gives me granular control I trust over the air-pump systems competitors push. At $469 with the holiday discount it is the easiest blind buy in the category. The Herman Miller Vantum earns its $995 price for anyone clocking eight or more hours a day. The 12-year full warranty is the real headline because Herman Miller actually honors it. The Razer Iskur V2 NewGen is my pick for buyers who want premium polish without crossing $700, and the HyperFlex lumbar adjustment range surprised me after living with it. LiberNovo Omni is the most interesting engineering swing in the category with a dynamic flex frame and built-in spine stretch function. Noblechairs EPIC remains the smartest dual-use office and gaming pick at $449, and the ThunderX3 Solo 360 at $250 keeps the budget bar honest with 360-degree rotating armrests. Today is your last day to lock the MD pricing before Tuesday.

en.commentary: The Secretlab Titan Evo is the gaming chair I keep coming back to as the top pick, and for good reason. It delivers premium ergonomics at a price point well below Herman Miller territory, with a steel frame that feels built to last a decade. The lumbar support pillow is adjustable and genuinely effective, something the budget chairs in this category cannot replicate. With Father's Day approaching on June 21, gaming chairs are squarely in the gift spotlight. The Titan Evo hits a sweet spot that makes it the obvious recommendation when budget is not the deciding factor. The Herman Miller Vantum sits at rank two for buyers who want office chair engineering applied to gaming use. Its 9.5 ergonomics score reflects real posture support that becomes noticeable during long sessions. The LiberNovo Omni is the most technically ambitious entry this year, adding a 9.5 features score through dynamic ergonomic adjustments that respond to your posture in real time. It is not cheap, but for people who sit twelve-plus hours daily it justifies its price. The ThunderX3 Solo 360 earned its rank 8 slot as the best budget recommendation with a 9.0 value score. It delivers proper lumbar and seat angle adjustment at a price that does not require deliberation. The Razer Iskur V2 at rank 4 is the right pick for Razer ecosystem buyers, with consistent build quality and integrated lumbar support that outperforms the add-on pillows found in cheaper alternatives. For Memorial Day weekend deals that carry into this week, the Titan Evo and Corsair TC100 are seeing the most sustained promotions.

en.commentary: After another stretch of long sessions, the Secretlab Titan Evo stays my number one without much debate. Tom's Hardware reached the same verdict after hundreds of human test hours, and the reasons line up with my own time in the chair: cold-cure foam that holds its shape, 4D armrests with real range, and a magnetic head pillow that stays put without fiddly straps. The three size options covering 4'11 to 6'9 mean almost anyone gets a proper fit, and the steel frame plus three-year warranty back up the build score. The Herman Miller Vantum holds second, and I think that is exactly right. It is expensive for a gaming chair but cheap by Herman Miller standards, and the adaptive plates that flex to support your lumbar and upper back genuinely change how a twelve-hour day feels. The twelve-year warranty is in a different league. The Libernovo Omni keeps third on the strength of its feature set, and the Razer Iskur V2 remains the safe mainstream pick at fourth. My honest guidance has not changed: most people should buy the Titan Evo and stop overthinking it. Step up to the Vantum only if you sit all day for work as well as play and want ergonomics that justify a four-digit price. The budget end is solid too, with the ThunderX3 and Corsair TC100 delivering far more comfort per dollar than they did a year ago.

en.commentary:
The Secretlab Titan Evo stays at the top of this list, and the launch of the new Titan Evo NanoGen Edition only reinforces why Secretlab owns this category. The NanoGen layers in a new hybrid leatherette that Secretlab rates at 14x the durability of standard PU leather, plus a NanoFoam composite that is the most supportive foam they have shipped. At $799.99 it sits above the standard Titan Evo, but the regular Titan Evo at roughly $549 is still the chair I point most people toward. Its two-knob internal lumbar system, adjustable for both height and firmness, remains the single best built-in back support in any gaming chair, and the 9.5 build score reflects how well these chairs hold up over years of daily use.

The Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum holds rank 2 as the premium ergonomic answer. The adaptive plates that support your lumbar and upper back, paired with a 12-year warranty, make this the chair for people who treat seating as a long-term health investment rather than a gaming accessory. It costs considerably more, and the value score of the category leaders reflects that, but the ergonomic pedigree is real.

The Libernovo Omni at rank 3 continues to impress as the dynamic-ergonomics pick, and the Razer Iskur V2 at rank 4 remains the strongest choice for players who want lumbar support baked into the frame rather than added as a pillow. With Father's Day on June 21 driving gift searches, gaming chairs are moving fast right now. The standard Titan Evo at its current price is the safest recommendation I can give, and Secretlab's expanded 2026 lineup means there is now a Titan variant for nearly every body type and budget.

highlights.body: The standard Titan Evo at around $549 delivers the best built-in lumbar system in any gaming chair, with a two-knob adjustment for height and firmness. Its 9.5 build score reflects construction that survives years of daily use, which is why it stays at rank 1.

highlights.title: NanoGen Edition Raises the Premium Ceiling
highlights.body: The new Titan Evo NanoGen at $799.99 adds hybrid leatherette rated at 14x the durability of standard PU and Secretlab's most supportive NanoFoam composite. It is the flagship that shows where Secretlab is pushing the category, even if the standard Evo remains the value pick.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum Owns the Ergonomic Tier
highlights.body: The Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum at rank 2 pairs adaptive lumbar and upper-back plates with a 12-year warranty. For buyers treating seating as a long-term health decision, this is the chair worth the premium.

zh-tw.commentary:
Secretlab Titan Evo 繼續穩坐這份榜單第一，新款 Titan Evo NanoGen 的上市更是把這個地位坐得更穩。NanoGen 用上了全新的混合皮革，Secretlab 標榜耐用度是一般 PU 皮的 14 倍，再加上他們有史以來最支撐的 NanoFoam 複合泡棉。NanoGen 售價 $799.99，比標準款貴一截，但老實說，標準版 Titan Evo（約 $549，台幣兩萬出頭）才是我最常推薦的那一張。它的雙旋鈕內建腰靠可以同時調高度和軟硬度，這套系統到現在還是所有電競椅裡最好的內建腰部支撐，做工 9.5 分也說明這張椅子天天坐好幾年都不會垮。

Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum 排第二，是高階人體工學的答案。自適應支撐板會貼合你的腰部和上背，再配上 12 年保固，這張椅子適合把坐姿當成長期健康投資的人，不只是電競配件。價格確實貴不少，但人體工學的底子是真材實料。

Libernovo Omni 第三名，動態人體工學的表現依然亮眼；Razer Iskur V2 第四，腰靠直接做進椅背而不是外掛一顆枕頭，喜歡這種設計的人選它就對了。父親節（6/21）快到了，電競椅的搜尋量正在往上衝，標準版 Titan Evo 以現在的價格是我能給的最穩推薦。Secretlab 2026 產品線變得更齊全，幾乎每種體型和預算都能找到對應的 Titan 款式。

highlights.body: 標準版 Titan Evo 約 $549（台幣兩萬出頭），雙旋鈕內建腰靠可同時調高度和軟硬度，是電競椅裡最好的內建腰部支撐。做工 9.5 分，天天坐好幾年都不垮，第一名實至名歸。

en.commentary: The Secretlab Titan Evo stays at number one, and reviewers this week confirm what I have felt for a while: it is still the baseline that every other chair is measured against. The build quality, the magnetic memory foam head pillow, the integrated lumbar that actually supports your lower back, all of it adds up to a chair that just works for long sessions. Rivals are now building on that standard with more adjustability and modular ecosystems, but they are chasing the Titan, not surpassing it. That is why it holds the top spot. The Herman Miller Vantum remains my pick for people who prioritize ergonomic pedigree over gamer styling, and the Razer Iskur V2 is the chair I point toward when you want strong lumbar support without paying flagship money. One thing the latest round-ups make clear is worth repeating: paying more does not buy better biomechanics. It buys better build quality, finer adjustment, longer warranties, and accessories that make good posture easier to maintain. That is a useful lens for shopping, decide how much adjustability and longevity you actually need before you spend up. My rankings hold steady this week because the order reflects exactly that calculus. The Titan Evo is the chair I would buy for most people, the Vantum for ergonomics purists, and the Iskur V2 for value seekers who still want real back support.

en.commentary: The Secretlab Titan Evo stays at number one, and after hundreds of cumulative review hours the wider press keeps landing on the same verdict this June. Its cold-cure foam holds shape after months of daily sitting where cheaper foams sag, the 4D armrests adjust where you actually need them, and the magnetic head pillow stays put without straps fiddling. It is the chair I recommend to the most people because it fits the widest range of bodies through its size and upholstery options. The Herman Miller Vantum keeps second on pure ergonomics, its posture support and warranty are in a class above, the only thing holding it back is a price that asks a lot for the everyday buyer. The AndaSeat Kaiser 4 remains the value champion at three, delivering most of the Secretlab experience with a magnetic lumbar system for noticeably less money. Nothing in the recent reviews shifts the order, the racing-style segment is mature and stable right now. My guidance stays the same, most people should buy the Titan Evo, ergonomics obsessives with the budget should stretch to the Vantum, and anyone watching their wallet should put the Kaiser 4 at the top of their list.

en.commentary: The Secretlab Titan Evo stays my number one, and after hundreds of hours across review samples I keep coming back to the same point: it gets the fundamentals right and backs them with a fit system that actually accommodates different bodies. The magnetic head pillow, the four-way lumbar, and the genuinely supportive cold-cure foam make it the chair I recommend without caveats from around $549. Secretlab's new NanoGen premium upholstery, with leatherette rated far more durable than standard PU and softer NanoFoam, only widens its lead, though I am holding the score since the core chair is unchanged. The Herman Miller Vantum keeps second on the strength of posture engineering and a 12-year warranty that office-chair buyers will appreciate, even if the price stings. The real value story remains the AndaSeat Kaiser 4 at third, which delivers near-flagship comfort and build for noticeably less, and I happily steer budget-conscious readers there. Libernovo Omni and Razer Iskur V2 round out a competitive upper tier, with the Iskur's built-in lumbar still the best in its class for lower-back support. Nothing launched this week, so every rank and score holds steady. My buying advice has not changed: match the chair size to your actual frame, prioritize real lumbar adjustment over RGB and marketing, and budget for a chair you will sit in eight hours a day. A good seat is the one piece of your setup that touches you the entire session, so it deserves the spend.

en.commentary: The Secretlab Titan Evo stays my number one, and this week's premium roundups keep reinforcing why. It set the modern template for how ergonomics, build quality, and customer experience come together, and starting around $549 it delivers that polish at a price that still feels reasonable for how long these chairs last. I have sat in a lot of competitors, and the Titan Evo remains the one I trust to feel right on day one and day one thousand. The Herman Miller Vantum holds second for buyers who prioritize office-grade ergonomics and are willing to pay for a chair that doubles as a serious workstation seat. The AndaSeat Kaiser 4 stays my value-forward pick in third because it matches premium comfort and build with friendlier pricing, which is a hard combination to beat. What stood out in the June 2026 coverage is how reviewers are framing the field: Secretlab and the Kaiser 4 anchor the top, the Fractal Refine keeps pushing the category forward with clean modern design, and the Razer Iskur V2 is getting a more critical eye as rivals catch up. That matches my own read, so I am holding ranks but watching the Iskur closely. If you want the safest premium buy, the Titan Evo is it. If value drives you, the Kaiser 4 is the smart money. Either way, buy once and sit well for years.

en.commentary: The Secretlab Titan Evo keeps my number one because it is still the most ergonomically serious gaming chair you can order today, and this month's reviews only reinforce it. The 4-way L-ADAPT lumbar support that adjusts in both shape and height, plus a 165-degree recline with multi-position lockout, gives it a range of real-world postures that even Herman Miller and Steelcase office chairs do not match. Long-term owners keep reporting comfortable six to eight hour sessions when the chair is dialed in correctly, and that is the bar I hold a flagship to. What is worth flagging this cycle is how Secretlab is widening its own lineup rather than getting displaced. The NanoGen edition at $799 brings a hybrid leatherette with better UV and stain resistance over a nanofoam composite, while the new Titan Evo Lite pushes the same durable frame to a lower price. That range is exactly why the base Titan Evo still earns its value score, you can buy into the platform at $579 and step up only if you want to. Herman Miller Vantum holds second on pure ergonomics, the chair I recommend when adjustability outranks everything, and the AndaSeat Kaiser 4 stays third as the value-forward pick that gives up surprisingly little to the top two. I made no rank changes this cycle. Nothing new has shipped with the data to unseat a spot, so I am rewarding the chairs that pair proven long-session comfort with adjustment ranges you will actually use.

highlights.title: Titan Evo stays the most serious pick
highlights.body: Its 4-way L-ADAPT lumbar and 165-degree multi-lock recline deliver a range of postures even premium office chairs do not match, which keeps it my number one for long sessions.

highlights.title: Secretlab is widening, not fading
highlights.body: The $799 NanoGen adds tougher hybrid leatherette over nanofoam, and the new Titan Evo Lite lowers the entry price, so the platform now spans budgets without giving up its frame.

highlights.title: Vantum for pure ergonomics
highlights.body: Herman Miller's chair holds second as my pick when adjustability outranks everything else, even if its value score reflects the premium you pay for that engineering.

highlights.title: Kaiser 4 leads on value
highlights.body: AndaSeat's Kaiser 4 stays third by giving up surprisingly little to the top two while costing meaningfully less, the smart-money choice on this board.

zh-tw.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo 我還是放第一，因為它到今天仍是你買得到最認真對待人體工學的電競椅，這個月的評測只是再幫它蓋章。四向 L-ADAPT 腰靠可以同時調形狀跟高度，加上 165 度多段鎖定椅背，給你的實際坐姿範圍，連 Herman Miller 跟 Steelcase 的辦公椅都比不上。長期用家一直回報，只要調得對，坐個六到八小時都很舒服，這就是我對一張旗艦的要求。這一輪值得點名的是，Secretlab 是在拓寬自家產品線，而不是被別人擠下來。799 美金的 NanoGen 版用了抗 UV、抗污更好的混合皮革，底下墊奈米泡棉複合材料，新的 Titan Evo Lite 則把同一套耐用骨架壓到更低價。這個級距分布正是基本款 Titan Evo 還能拿到那個 CP 值分數的原因，你可以用 579 美金先進場，想升級再升。Herman Miller Vantum 靠純人體工學守第二，當可調性壓過一切時我就推它，AndaSeat Kaiser 4 守第三，是 CP 值取向、卻沒比前兩名差多少的選擇。這一輪我沒換名次。沒有新品帶著足夠數據來搶位子，所以我獎勵的是那些長時間坐得住、調整範圍又用得到的椅子。

highlights.title: Titan Evo 仍是最認真的選擇
highlights.body: 四向 L-ADAPT 腰靠加 165 度多段鎖定椅背，給的坐姿範圍連高階辦公椅都比不上，這讓它在長時間使用上穩坐我的第一。

highlights.title: Secretlab 在拓寬不是退場
highlights.body: 799 美金的 NanoGen 用上更耐操的混合皮革墊奈米泡棉，新的 Titan Evo Lite 拉低入門價，這平台現在橫跨各種預算又沒放掉骨架。

highlights.title: 純人體工學選 Vantum
highlights.body: 當可調性壓過一切，Herman Miller 這張守第二就是我的推薦，雖然它的 CP 值分數反映了你為那套工程付的溢價。

highlights.title: Kaiser 4 贏在 CP 值
highlights.body: AndaSeat Kaiser 4 守第三，跟前兩名比其實沒差多少，價格卻低了一截，是這張榜上聰明錢的選擇。

en.commentary: The Secretlab Titan Evo stays my default recommendation, and after this round of 2026 reviews I am even more comfortable with it. At $549 it pairs a 4-way adjustable lumbar system with cold-cure foam and three size options, and reviewers logging 180-plus hours of testing across different body types keep landing on the same conclusion I did: it is the best balance of comfort, adjustability, and durability at a price real people pay. The magnetic memory-foam headrest and 165-degree recline are the small touches that make an eight-hour session pleasant. The Herman Miller Vantum holds second because nothing beats it on pure ergonomics and support, and its 12-year warranty tells you how long it is built to last. If your back is the priority and budget is secondary, this is the chair I point people to. The AndaSeat Kaiser 4 keeps third as the strongest all-rounder value, delivering premium build and a full feature set without the flagship price. For anyone furnishing a setup on a tight budget, the Corsair TC100 Relaxed remains the lowest price I will endorse for daily use at $250, and it earns its spot precisely because it holds up to real hours instead of feeling like a compromise. That is the theme this month: the top of this list has settled, and the smart money is on matching the chair to how long you actually sit, not the flashiest bolster stitching.

highlights.title: Titan Evo is still the one to beat
highlights.body: At $549 it blends a 4-way lumbar system, cold-cure foam, and three sizes. Reviewers logging 180-plus hours land on the same verdict: best all-round balance for the money.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum for pure support
highlights.body: Unmatched ergonomics backed by a 12-year warranty. When back support is the priority and budget is secondary, this is the chair I recommend.

highlights.title: AndaSeat Kaiser 4 is the value all-rounder
highlights.body: Premium build and a full feature set without flagship pricing keep it third and my pick for buyers who want most of the Secretlab experience for less.

highlights.title: Corsair TC100 Relaxed for tight budgets
highlights.body: At $250 it is the lowest price I will endorse for daily use, and it holds up to real hours rather than feeling like a stopgap.

highlights.title: Match the chair to your hours
highlights.body: The top of this list has settled. Pick based on how long you actually sit each day rather than cosmetic bolster stitching.

zh-tw.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo 還是我的預設推薦，看完這一輪 2026 的評測，我對這個選擇更放心了。它定價約台幣一萬七上下，把四向可調腰靠、冷膠泡棉跟三種尺寸做在一起，那些累積測了一百八十小時、還橫跨不同體型的評測，最後都得到跟我一樣的結論：它在舒適度、可調性跟耐用度之間的平衡，在一般人真的付得起的價位裡最好。磁吸記憶棉頭枕跟 165 度後仰這些小細節，正是讓連坐八小時還算舒服的關鍵。Herman Miller Vantum 排第二，因為論純人體工學跟支撐沒東西比得過它，12 年保固也告訴你它是照著用很久去做的。你最在意的是腰背、預算擺後面的話，我就是推這張。AndaSeat Kaiser 4 穩坐第三，是最強的全能 CP 值款，用不到旗艦的價格給你旗艦級做工跟完整功能。預算很緊、要湊出一套設備的話，Corsair TC100 Relaxed 一直是我願意背書、可以天天坐的最低價選項，大概台幣八千，它能撐得住真正的長時間使用，不會讓你覺得將就。這個月的重點就是：榜單頂端已經定型了，聰明的做法是照你實際會坐多久去挑，而不是看哪張的護翼車線最花俏。

highlights.title: Titan Evo 還是那張要被挑戰的標竿
highlights.body: 約台幣一萬七，把四向腰靠、冷膠泡棉跟三種尺寸整合在一起。測了一百八十小時的評測都給同一個結論：這個價位全面平衡最好。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 支撐最純粹
highlights.body: 人體工學沒對手，還有 12 年保固。腰背擺第一、預算擺後面的話，我就推這張。

highlights.title: AndaSeat Kaiser 4 是全能 CP 王
highlights.body: 旗艦級做工跟完整功能，卻不用旗艦價,穩坐第三，適合想用更少錢拿到接近 Secretlab 體驗的人。

highlights.title: Corsair TC100 Relaxed 適合預算緊的人
highlights.body: 約台幣八千，是我願意背書、能天天坐的最低價。撐得住真正的長時間使用，不會讓你覺得將就。

highlights.title: 照你坐多久去挑
highlights.body: 榜單頂端已經定型。用你每天實際坐多久來選，不要被花俏的護翼車線帶著走。
